id.title: Id
id.description: Unique identifier for the background character

BackgroundCharacter.title: BackgroundCharacter
BackgroundCharacter.description:
A background character is someone who is not important enough to have his own agent. They are only
reactive, cannot make decisions directly, and is controlled as world state changes. They can be friendly,
neutral or hostile, so enemies are also using this model

location_id.title: Location Id
location_id.description: Optional location where the background character is present

landmark_id.title: Landmark Id
landmark_id.description: Optional landmark the background character is anchored to

user_controlled.description: Whether the user controls the character

public_state.title: Public State
public_state.description: Public state of the character, i.e. what he is appeared to be doing

private_state.title: Private State
private_state.description: Private state of the character, i.e. what he is thinking or secretly doing

Character.title: Character
Character.description:
A character in a simulation.

A character may be an important NPC or the character that the user controls. The system does not
differentiate between them internally to maintain consistency on decision-making.

user_controlled.title: User Controlled
user_controlled.description: Whether the user controls the character

public_state.title: Public State
public_state.description: Public state of the character, i.e. what he is appeared to be doing

private_state.title: Private State
private_state.description: Private state of the character, i.e. what he is thinking or secretly doing

Container.title: Container
Container.description:
A container is an entity that can hold item or equipment. It is a first class entity, because
it has special state and relationship that needs to be checked deterministically.

state.description: The current state of the container

location_id.title: Location Id
location_id.description: Optional location where the container is present

held_stack_ids.title: Held Stack Ids

held_container_ids.title: Held Container Ids
held_container_ids.description: Optional containers held by the container

unlocking_item_ids.title: Unlocking Item Ids
unlocking_item_ids.description: Optional items that unlock the container

CurrentActivity.title: CurrentActivity
CurrentActivity.description:
An activity that the character is currently engaged in

This model matches what would be proposed by the LLM, so that later the proposal becomes
the new state

Equipment.title: Equipment
Equipment.description:
A piece of equipment that character can wear. Only wearable items are considered equipment.

The equipment does not have a wearable slot on purpose, so that it can be put on anywhere. The system will
check for conflictions

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Optional quality modifier of the equipment

equipped_position.description: If equipped, where the equipment is worn

seed.description: The seed to use for the chat

reasoning.title: Reasoning
reasoning.description: Whether to enable reasoning for the chat. Set to True or False to enable/disable reasoning, or `'low'`, `'medium'`, `'high'` to set the reasoning level. Leave None to use the default model reasoning level

stop_tokens.title: Stop Tokens
stop_tokens.description: The stop tokens to use for the chat

mirostat.title: Mirostat
mirostat.description: Enable Mirostat sampling for controlling perplexity.

mirostat_eta.title: Mirostat Eta
mirostat_eta.description: Influences how quickly the algorithm responds to feedback from generated text.

mirostat_tau.title: Mirostat Tau
mirostat_tau.description: Controls the balance between coherence and diversity of the output.

num_predict.title: Num Predict
num_predict.description: Maximum number of tokens to predict when generating text.

repeat_penalty_window.title: Repeat Penalty Window
repeat_penalty_window.description: Sets how far back for the model to look back to prevent repetition.

repeat_penalty.title: Repeat Penalty
repeat_penalty.description: Sets how strongly to penalize repetitions.
